sqlMap.select: SELECT TITLE , TITLE2 , POSTDATE , CONTENT, ITEMSEQ FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TITLE , TITLE2 , CONTENT , WIDTH , HEIGHT , POSITION , STARTDATE , ENDDATE FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POSTDATE , TITLE , TITLE2 FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE CompanyID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC LIMIT #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#

select.isEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , IFNULL(ENDDATE, DATE_FORMAT('1900-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE FROM ( SELECT ITEMSEQ , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , STARTDATE , IFNULL(ENDDATE, DATE_FORMAT('1900-01-01', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) EndDate FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ ASC LIMIT #v_pTotal# - #v_pStart# ) temp ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC LIMIT #v_pCount#

isEqual.isEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN
isEqual.isNotEmpty: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND SLIDERID = #sliderID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

select.isNotEqual: SELECT SLIDERID , SLIDERNAME , SLIDERNAME2 , IMAGEPATH , REGUSERID , REGDATE , SN , ISUSE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_COMPANYID# AND ISUSE = 1 AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN

sqlMap.select: SELECT QUICKLINKID , QUICKLINKNAME , QUICKLINKNAME2 , QUICKLINKNAME3 , QUICKLINKNAME4 , LINKTYPE , URL , REGUSERID , SIZE_ FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT QUICKLINKID , ACCESSID , ACCESSNAME , ACCESSNAME2 , VIEW_FLAG FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT RESULT , COUNT(RESULT) COUNT FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RESULT ORDER BY RESULT

SELECT ITEMSEQ , STARTDATE , IFNULL(ENDDATE, '1900-01-01') EndDate , POLLSELECTIONCOUNT , POLLTITLE , POLLTITLE2 , ANSWER1 , ANSWER2 , ANSWER3 , ANSWER4 , ANSWER5 , ANSWER6 , ANSWER7 , ANSWER8 , ANSWER9 , ANSWER10 FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT ITEMSEQ , TITLE , TITLE2 , STARTDATE , ENDDATE , WIDTH , HEIGHT , POSITION FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY ITEMSEQ DESC
SELECT * FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY DATE_ DESC

SELECT QUICKLINKID , QUICKLINKNAME , QUICKLINKNAME2 , QUICKLINKNAME3 , QUICKLINKNAME4 , LINKTYPE , URL , REGDATE , MODIDATE , REGUSERID , U.DISPLAYNAME DISPLAYNAME , U.DISPLAYNAME2 DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK Q JOIN TBL_USERMASTER U ON Q.RegUserID = U.CN AND Q.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID WHERE Q.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND U.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
select.isNotEqual: SELECT COUNT(ITEMSEQ) FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE COMPANYID = #v_pCompanyID# OR COMPANYID = 'Top' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_NOTICE ( COMPANYID, TITLE, TITLE2, CONTENT, POSTDATE, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #companyID#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pTitle2#, #v_pContent#, DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_QUICKLINK ( QUICKLINKID, QUICKLINKNAME, QUICKLINKNAME2, QUICKLINKNAME3, QUICKLINKNAME4, LINKTYPE, LINKTYPEURL, URL, REGDATE, REGUSERID, SIZE_, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_QUICKLINKID#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME2#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME3#, #v_QUICKLINKNAME4#, #v_LINKTYPE#, #v_LINKTYPEURL#, #v_URL#, #v_NOWDATE#, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_SIZE#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_QUICKLINK SET QUICKLINKNAME = #v_QUICKLINKNAME#, QUICKLINKNAME2 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME2#, QUICKLINKNAME3 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME3#, QUICKLINKNAME4 = #v_QUICKLINKNAME4#, LINKTYPE = #v_LINKTYPE#, LINKTYPEURL = #v_LINKTYPEURL#, URL = #v_URL#, MODIDATE = #v_NOWDATE#, SIZE_ = #v_SIZE# WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL ( QUICKLINKID, ACCESSID, ACCESSNAME, ACCESSNAME2, VIEW_FLAG, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_QUICKLINKID#, #v_ACCESSID#, #v_ACCESSNAME#, #v_ACCESSNAME2#, #v_VIEW_FLAG#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_NOTICE SET TITLE = #v_pTitle#, TITLE2 = #v_pTitle2#, CONTENT = #v_pContent# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET ENDDATE = #nowDate# WHERE ENDDATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL SET ENDDATE = DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WHERE ENDDATE IS NULL AND CompanyID = #v_pCompanyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL ( COMPANYID, STARTDATE, POLLSELECTIONCOUNT, POLLTITLE, POLLTITLE2, ANSWER1, ANSWER2, ANSWER3, ANSWER4, ANSWER5, ANSWER6, ANSWER7, ANSWER8, ANSWER9, ANSWER10, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pCompanyID#, DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_pSelectionCount#, #v_pPollTitle#, #v_pPollTitle2#, #v_pAnswer1#, #v_pAnswer2#, #v_pAnswer3#, #v_pAnswer4#, #v_pAnswer5#, #v_pAnswer6#, #v_pAnswer7#, #v_pAnswer8#, #v_pAnswer9#, #v_pAnswer10#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL ( COMPANYID, STARTDATE, POLLSELECTIONCOUNT, POLLTITLE, POLLTITLE2, ANSWER1, ANSWER2, ANSWER3, ANSWER4, ANSWER5, ANSWER6, ANSWER7, ANSWER8, ANSWER9, ANSWER10, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( UPPER(#v_pCompanyID#), DATE_FORMAT(#nowDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_pSelectionCount#, #v_pPollTitle#, #v_pPollTitle2#, #v_pAnswer1#, #v_pAnswer2#, #v_pAnswer3#, #v_pAnswer4#, #v_pAnswer5#, #v_pAnswer6#, #v_pAnswer7#, #v_pAnswer8#, #v_pAnswer9#, #v_pAnswer10#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_PS_POPUP ( COMPANYID, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, WIDTH, HEIGHT, POSITION, TITLE, TITLE2, CONTENT, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_pCompanyID#, DATE_FORMAT(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), DATE_FORMAT(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), #v_pWidth#, #v_pHeight#, #v_pPosition#, #v_pTitle#, #v_pTitle2#, #v_pContent#, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_POPUP SET STARTDATE = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pStartDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), ENDDATE = DATE_FORMAT(#v_pEndDate#, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), WIDTH = #v_pWidth#, HEIGHT = #v_pHeight#, POSITION = #v_pPosition#, TITLE = #v_pTitle#, TITLE2 = #v_pTitle2#, CONTENT = #v_pContent# WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_EMPMONTH ( CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2, PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2, TITLE, TITLE2, TERM, DATE_, TENANT_ID) ( SELECT CN , DISPLAYNAME , DISPLAYNAME2 , DEPARTMENT , DESCRIPTION , DESCRIPTION2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , TITLE , TITLE2 , #v_pTerm# , DATE_FORMAT(#v_pTerm#, '%Y-%m'), TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #v_pUserID# AND DEPARTMENT = #v_pDeptID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION SELECT B.CN , B.DISPLAYNAME , B.DISPLAYNAME2 , C.CN , C.DISPLAYNAME , C.DISPLAYNAME2 , PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME , COMPANY , COMPANY2 , A.TITLE , A.TITLE2 , #v_pTerm# , DATE_FORMAT(#v_pTerm#, '%Y-%m'), A.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A JOIN TBL_USERMASTER B ON A.CN = B.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER C ON A.DEPTID = C.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID WHERE B.CN = #v_pUserID# AND A.DEPTID = #v_pDeptID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# )
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_EMPMONTH WHERE TERM = #v_pTerm# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ( SLIDERID, SLIDERNAME, SLIDERNAME2, FILENAME, IMAGEPATH, REGUSERID, REGDATE, COMPANYID, ISUSE, SN, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #v_SLIDERID#, #v_SLIDERNAME#, #v_SLIDERNAME2#, #v_FILENAME#, #v_IMAGEPATH#, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGDATE#, #v_COMPANYID#, 1, #count# + 1, #tenantID# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET SLIDERNAME = #v_SLIDERNAME#, SLIDERNAME2 = #v_SLIDERNAME2#, FILENAME = #v_FILENAME#, IMAGEPATH = #v_IMAGEPATH# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET ISUSE = #v_VALUE# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE SET SN = #v_VALUE# WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_NOTICE WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLL WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_LIGHTPOLLRESULT WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_POPUP WHERE ITEMSEQ = #v_pItemSeq# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE WHERE SLIDERID = #v_SLIDERID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.statement: MERGE INTO TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE USING ( SELECT TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.ROWID row_id, TEMPTABLE.SN FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE JOIN ( SELECT SLIDERID , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY SN ) SN FROM TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE ) TEMPTABLE ON TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.SliderID = TEMPTABLE.SLIDERID ) src ON ( TBL_PS_SLIDERIMAGE.ROWID = src.row_id ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SN = src.SN
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK WHERE QUICKLINKID = #v_QUICKLINKID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_PS_QUICKLINK_ACL WHERE QUICKLINKID = #quickLinkID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
